examples: Parsons was a committed believer in phrenology.
Though absurdly unscientific even for its time, phrenology was remarkably prescient - up to a point.
Then we analyze an anti-rational tendency through hegel's discussion of physiognomy and phrenology in phenomenology of spirit.
Maybe our phrenology, like the original nineteenth-century version, is nonsense?
Craniology, phrenology and eugenics, once-respectable fields of endeavour that are now regarded with a shudder, may shriek from time to time, but few sane people pay attention to them.
